languages.text: На массивном перстне выгравирован герб фон Валанциус. По его безупречному блеску видно, сколь истово владелец чтит династию.

traits.locale_text: На массивном перстне выгравирован герб фон Валанциус. По его безупречному блеску видно, сколь истово владелец чтит династию.

languages.text: The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.
languages.original_text: На массивном перстне выгравирован герб фон Валанциус. По его безупречному блеску видно, сколь истово владелец чтит династию.

traits.locale_text: The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.
The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.
The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.

languages.text: Auf dem massiven Ring ist das Wappen des Hauses von Valancius eingraviert. Sein makelloser Glanz zeigt, wie leidenschaftlich seine Trägerin die Dynastie verehrt.
languages.original_text: The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Auf dem massiven Ring ist das Wappen des Hauses von Valancius eingraviert. Sein makelloser Glanz zeigt, wie leidenschaftlich seine Trägerin die Dynastie verehrt.

languages.text: 这枚坚实的戒指上镌刻着冯·瓦兰修斯家族的纹章。它完美无瑕的光泽，足以说明佩戴者对王朝怀有何等虔诚的敬意。
languages.original_text: The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 这枚坚实的戒指上镌刻着冯·瓦兰修斯家族的纹章。它完美无瑕的光泽，足以说明佩戴者对王朝怀有何等虔诚的敬意。

languages.text: Les armoiries des von Valancius ont été gravées sur la chevalière. Son lustre impeccable reflète le profond dévouement de sa propriétaire à la dynastie.
languages.original_text: The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Les armoiries des von Valancius ont été gravées sur la chevalière. Son lustre impeccable reflète le profond dévouement de sa propriétaire à la dynastie.

languages.text: El anillo parece macizo y tiene grabado el escudo de armas de los von Valancius. Su impecable lustre denota el fervor de la pleitesía que rinde su propietaria a la dinastía.
languages.original_text: The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: El anillo parece macizo y tiene grabado el escudo de armas de los von Valancius. Su impecable lustre denota el fervor de la pleitesía que rinde su propietaria a la dinastía.

languages.text: Von Valancius arması, sağlam görünümlü yüzüğün üzerine kazınmış. Kusursuz parlaklığı, onu takanın hanedanlığa ne kadar hararetle saygı duyduğunu gösteriyor.
languages.original_text: The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Von Valancius arması, sağlam görünümlü yüzüğün üzerine kazınmış. Kusursuz parlaklığı, onu takanın hanedanlığa ne kadar hararetle saygı duyduğunu gösteriyor.

languages.text: 頑丈な指輪に刻まれたフォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章。その輝きは、この指輪を身につける者の家への深い敬意を表している。
languages.original_text: The von Valancius coat of arms is engraved on the solid-looking ring. Its flawless lustre shows how fervently its wearer reveres the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 頑丈な指輪に刻まれたフォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章。その輝きは、この指輪を身につける者の家への深い敬意を表している。
